stemHtml: An aircraft flying on the traffic circuit of a controlled aerodrome is encountering radio communications failure. What is the correct course of action?

options.a: Set the transponder code to 7700 and perform radio checks, at 1-minute intervals, to all aeronautical stations.
options.b: Rock the aircraft wings and flash navigational lights, at irregular intervals, to signal communication failure.
options.c: Transmit blind your messages, twice, and watch for instructions which may be issued by visual signals.
options.d: Transmit blind, on the APP secondary frequency, the number of souls on board and remaining fuel.
